evals.prompt: How do I create a welcome email automation in ActiveCampaign?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on creating a welcome email automation in ActiveCampaign

assertions.name: mentions_automation_trigger
assertions.description: Mentions creating an automation with a trigger such as subscribes to list or submits a form

assertions.name: mentions_email_action_steps
assertions.description: Mentions adding email action steps with wait or delay between them

evals.prompt: I want to set up lead scoring in ActiveCampaign to prioritize my hottest contacts
evals.expected_output: Guidance on setting up lead scoring in ActiveCampaign

assertions.name: mentions_scoring_model
assertions.description: Mentions creating a scoring model or contact score

assertions.name: mentions_engagement_rules
assertions.description: Mentions scoring rules based on engagement such as opens, clicks, site visits, or form submissions

assertions.name: mentions_score_thresholds
assertions.description: Mentions using score thresholds to trigger automations or notify sales

evals.prompt: How do I create a deal and add it to a pipeline using the ActiveCampaign API?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the ActiveCampaign API to create a deal in a pipeline

assertions.name: mentions_pipeline_and_stage
assertions.description: Mentions specifying pipeline and stage in the deal creation payload
